Users upload a product photo and select a style to receive multiple AI-generated marketing-ready images.
use_cases: Small businesses creating professional product photos without a photographer
Generating multiple themed product images for marketing campaigns
Creating consistent product imagery across social platforms
Testing different visual styles for products before committing to photoshoots
Rapid content creation for seasonal promotions

name: ReturnGO
description: ReturnGO is an AI-powered returns and exchanges management platform for e-commerce stores that automates the returns process with intelligent return policies, automated approvals, and proactive return analytics. Its AI identifies return patterns and recommends actions to reduce return rates and improve customer experience.
use_cases: Automating return request approvals based on configurable policies
Offering exchanges and store credit to reduce refund rates
Identifying products with high return rates for quality review
Streamlining returns portal experience for customers
Analyzing return reasons to reduce future return rates

name: Route
description: Route is an AI-powered post-purchase platform that provides package protection, order tracking, and carbon-neutral shipping options for e-commerce brands and their customers. Its AI detects shipping issues proactively and automates claims resolution to reduce customer service burden.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free for merchants; customers pay small protection fee
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Merchant pricing based on order volume

use_cases: Protecting customer orders from loss, theft, and damage
Providing real-time order tracking across all carriers
Automating claims for lost or damaged packages
Offering carbon-neutral shipping as a brand sustainability feature
Reducing WISMO (where is my order) customer support tickets

name: DeepL
description: DeepL is an AI-powered translation platform known for producing more natural and accurate translations than competing services, supporting 33 languages for text, documents, and website translation. Its neural machine translation technology is consistently rated highest by professional translators for fluency and contextual accuracy.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free with character limits; documents with watermarks

use_cases: Translating business documents and contracts with high accuracy
Real-time website localization for international audiences
Professional translators using AI for post-editing workflows
Enterprise teams integrating translation into content workflows via API
Confidential document translation with data privacy guarantees

name: Google Translate
description: Google Translate is a free AI-powered translation service supporting over 133 languages for text, speech, images, and documents, used by over 500 million people daily. Its Neural Machine Translation technology provides near real-time translations with continuous improvements from Google's AI research.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Cloud Translation API: $20 per million characters

use_cases: Travelers communicating in foreign languages via camera translation
Casual translation of emails and web pages
Developers building multilingual apps via the Translation API
Real-time conversation translation with two-way mode
Reading foreign language content and documents

name: Microsoft Translator
description: Microsoft Translator is an AI-powered translation service supporting 100+ languages for text, speech, and real-time conversation translation, deeply integrated into Microsoft products like Office, Teams, and Edge. Its Azure Cognitive Services API provides enterprise-grade translation for developers and businesses.

pricing_detail.free_tier: 2 million characters free per month via Azure
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Azure Cognitive Services: $10 per million characters

use_cases: Real-time multilingual captions in Microsoft Teams meetings
Translating Office documents within Word and PowerPoint
Building multilingual apps using Azure Translation API
Travel communication through the real-time conversation feature
Enterprise applications requiring secure, scalable translation

name: Apple Translate
description: Apple Translate is a privacy-focused translation app built into iOS and macOS that supports 20 languages with on-device translation capabilities for offline use. It integrates with the iOS system for instant text selection translation and conversation mode for bilingual dialogues.
use_cases: iPhone users translating text without internet connection
Bilingual conversations with face-to-face conversation mode
Translating text in photos using iOS camera integration
Quick translations from any iOS system translation menu

name: Amazon Translate
description: Amazon Translate is a neural machine translation service from AWS that provides fast, affordable, and customizable language translation for developers and enterprises through a scalable cloud API. It supports 75 languages and integrates with other AWS services for building multilingual applications.

pricing_detail.free_tier: 2 million characters free per month for 12 months

use_cases: AWS developers adding translation to web and mobile applications
Translating user-generated content in real time
Customer support ticket translation for multilingual teams
Document translation pipelines with custom terminology
Cross-lingual search and content discovery systems

name: Papago
description: Papago is an AI-powered translation app by Naver Corporation that specializes in Asian language translation, particularly Korean, Japanese, and Chinese, offering high-quality translations optimized for East Asian linguistic nuances. It provides text, image, speech, and conversation translation modes.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Papago Translation API available through Naver Cloud Platform

use_cases: Korean learners and K-pop fans translating Korean content
Business travelers communicating in South Korea and Japan
Translating Korean news articles and social media content
Camera translation for signs and menus in East Asian countries
Korean-English interpretation for meetings and conversations

name: Smartling
description: Smartling is an AI-powered translation management platform that helps enterprises automate and scale content localization across websites, apps, and documents using neural machine translation, human translators, and workflow automation. Its LanguageAI suite combines AI translation with linguistic expertise for high-quality results.
use_cases: Enterprise software companies localizing products into 20+ languages
Global brands automating website content translation
Mobile app developers managing multilingual app store listings
Marketing teams localizing campaigns for regional markets
Customer support knowledge base translation for global users

name: Lokalise
description: Lokalise is an AI-powered localization and translation management platform used by software teams to localize mobile apps, websites, and games with collaborative workflows and AI translation assistance. It integrates with GitHub, Figma, and CI/CD pipelines for developer-friendly localization.
use_cases: Mobile app developers managing iOS and Android string localization
Game studios localizing in-game text and UI
SaaS companies automating translation in CI/CD pipelines
Translating Figma design files before development begins
Managing translation memories and glossaries across projects

name: Phrase
description: Phrase is an AI-powered localization platform (formerly Memsource) that provides translation management, computer-assisted translation, and machine translation post-editing tools for professional translators and enterprise localization teams. Its AI features include adaptive machine translation that learns from translator corrections.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Starter ~$27/month; Professional ~$87/month; Team ~$147/month; Enterprise on request

use_cases: Professional translators managing client projects with CAT tools
LSPs coordinating complex multilingual translation projects
Enterprise teams managing continuous localization workflows
Translating software strings with in-context preview tools
Machine translation post-editing for faster high-volume projects

name: Unbabel
description: Unbabel is an AI-powered translation platform for customer experience that combines neural machine translation with a community of professional editors to deliver fast, high-quality translations for customer support, marketing, and product content. It specializes in helping global brands deliver consistent multilingual customer experiences.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Enterprise pricing based on volume; pay per word

use_cases: Customer support teams handling multilingual support tickets
Translating live chat conversations for global customer service
Localizing help center articles and FAQs for international markets
Translating marketing emails and campaigns for regional audiences
Integrating real-time translation into Zendesk and Salesforce

name: Translated
description: Translated provides AI-powered professional translation services combining neural machine translation with human expertise. It supports over 200 languages and serves major technology companies with scalable localization solutions.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Per-word pricing based on language pair and volume

name: Weglot
description: Weglot is an AI-powered website translation solution that detects and translates website content automatically, then serves translated versions via subdomains or subdirectories. It integrates with all major CMS platforms including WordPress, Shopify, and Webflow.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Starter from $17/month, Business and Enterprise tiers available

name: Transifex
description: Transifex is a cloud-based localization platform that uses AI to accelerate translation workflows for software, websites, and mobile apps. It provides translation memory, machine translation integration, and collaboration tools for localization teams.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Starter from $80/month, Growth and Enterprise plans available

name: Crowdin
description: Crowdin is an AI-powered localization management platform that helps development teams translate software, mobile apps, and documentation efficiently. It features machine translation engines, translation memory, and integrations with popular development tools like GitHub and Jira.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Basic from $25/month, Pro and Enterprise tiers available

name: Lilt
description: Lilt is an enterprise AI translation platform that combines adaptive machine translation with human linguists to deliver high-quality translations at scale. It uses a proprietary AI engine that learns from translator corrections to continuously improve output quality.

name: Trados (RWS)
description: Trados by RWS is the industry-leading computer-assisted translation (CAT) tool that combines AI-powered translation memory, terminology management, and machine translation to accelerate professional translation workflows. It is widely used by professional translators and localization teams worldwide.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Trados Studio from ~$845 one-time or subscription from $69/month

name: MemoQ
description: MemoQ is a professional computer-assisted translation environment that integrates AI-powered translation memory, terminology management, and machine translation plugins. It is widely adopted by translation agencies and enterprise localization teams for collaborative translation projects.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Freelancer from ~$200/year, Project Manager and Server editions available

name: Wordfast
description: Wordfast is a translation memory tool and computer-assisted translation platform available as a desktop application, web app, and Microsoft Word plugin. It helps professional translators improve productivity using translation memories and terminology databases.

name: MateCat
description: MateCat is a free, open-source web-based computer-assisted translation tool that integrates machine translation engines and translation memory to speed up professional translation. It is developed by Translated and allows translators to work on projects directly in the browser.

name: Lingvanex
description: Lingvanex is an AI-powered translation API and platform that provides machine translation across 100+ languages for applications, documents, and websites. It offers on-premise deployment options for organizations requiring data privacy and security compliance.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Pro plans from $9/month, Enterprise custom pricing

name: Reverso
description: Reverso is an AI-powered translation and language learning tool that provides contextual translations with real-world usage examples from its large bilingual corpus. It supports translation, conjugation, spell checking, and vocabulary learning across 20+ languages.

name: Linguee
description: Linguee is an AI translation dictionary and search engine that finds translations by searching a vast database of bilingual texts from the web, showing how words and phrases are used in real-world context. It is particularly useful for finding idiomatic expressions and technical terminology.

name: Yandex Translate
description: Yandex Translate is an AI-powered machine translation service that supports 100+ languages and offers text, document, and image translation. It is developed by Yandex and provides a free API for developers to integrate translation into their applications.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: API pricing per character for developers

name: Systran
description: Systran is a pioneer AI translation platform providing neural machine translation solutions for enterprises and government agencies, with both cloud and on-premise deployment options. It specializes in domain-specific translation models for industries like legal, defense, and technology.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Enterprise and government pricing available, custom quotes

name: TextUnited
description: TextUnited is an AI-powered translation management platform that combines machine translation, translation memory, and human translators in a unified workflow for businesses. It supports automated project creation, glossary management, and integrations with popular CMS and development tools.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Plans from $30/month based on word volume

name: Darktrace
description: Darktrace is an AI cybersecurity platform that uses self-learning AI to detect and autonomously respond to cyber threats across cloud, SaaS, email, and network environments. Its Autonomous Response technology interrupts attacks in real time without disrupting normal business operations.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Enterprise pricing, custom quotes based on network size

name: CrowdStrike
description: CrowdStrike Falcon is an AI-native endpoint security platform that provides real-time threat detection, prevention, and response across endpoints, workloads, and identities. Its Charlotte AI delivers generative AI capabilities for security operations, enabling faster threat investigation and response.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Falcon Go from $59.99/device/year, Pro and Enterprise tiers available

name: SentinelOne
description: SentinelOne is an AI-powered cybersecurity platform providing autonomous endpoint protection, detection, and response using behavioral AI models. Its Singularity platform unifies endpoint, cloud, and identity security with AI-driven threat detection and automated remediation.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Singularity Core from $69.99/endpoint/year, Complete and Enterprise tiers available

name: Palo Alto Cortex
description: Palo Alto Networks Cortex is an AI-driven security operations platform that integrates XDR, SOAR, and threat intelligence to accelerate detection and response across endpoints, networks, and cloud. It uses machine learning to reduce alert fatigue and automate security workflows.

name: Vectra AI
description: Vectra AI is an AI-powered network detection and response platform that detects cyberattacker behavior across hybrid and multi-cloud environments in real time. It uses patented AI-driven Threat Detection and Response to identify and prioritize attacks based on attacker behavior patterns.

name: Cybereason
description: Cybereason is an AI-powered endpoint detection and response platform that detects malicious operations (MalOps) rather than individual alerts, providing security teams with full attack story context. Its AI engine analyzes billions of security events to identify and predict attacker behavior.

name: Sophos AI
description: Sophos is an AI-powered cybersecurity platform offering endpoint protection, network security, and cloud security with deep learning and behavioral AI models. Its Intercept X product uses predictive deep learning AI to prevent malware, ransomware, and zero-day threats.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Sophos Home from $44.99/year; Enterprise pricing custom

name: Fortinet FortiAI
description: Fortinet FortiAI is an AI-powered security assistant embedded in the Fortinet Security Fabric that uses generative AI to help security teams investigate threats, write automation scripts, and understand network security posture. It integrates across Fortinet's product portfolio to accelerate SOC operations.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Bundled with Fortinet security products, enterprise pricing

name: Check Point AI
description: Check Point AI is the AI-powered security engine embedded across Check Point's Infinity platform, providing zero-day threat prevention for networks, cloud, and endpoints. Its ThreatCloud AI repository updates threat intelligence in real time using data from millions of sensors worldwide.

name: Recorded Future
description: Recorded Future is the world's largest threat intelligence company, using AI to analyze open web, dark web, and technical data to deliver real-time, actionable intelligence. It helps security teams identify threats before they materialize and prioritize risks based on business context.

name: Anomali
description: Anomali is an AI-powered threat intelligence platform that correlates threat data with security logs to detect and respond to cyberattacks faster. It aggregates indicators of compromise from hundreds of threat feeds and enriches SIEM data with actionable intelligence.

name: ThreatConnect
description: ThreatConnect is an AI-driven threat intelligence platform and security orchestration solution that centralizes threat data, enables collaboration, and automates security workflows. Its Risk Quantifier module helps organizations measure and communicate cyber risk in financial terms.

name: Exabeam
description: Exabeam is an AI-powered SIEM and security analytics platform that uses behavioral analytics and machine learning to detect anomalous user and entity behavior. Its Smart Timelines feature automatically constructs attack timelines, reducing investigation time significantly.

name: Sumo Logic
description: Sumo Logic is a cloud-native security information and event management (SIEM) and log analytics platform that uses machine learning to detect security threats and operational issues. It provides real-time insights across cloud infrastructure, applications, and security events.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Essentials from $3/GB ingested, Enterprise pricing available

name: Splunk AI
description: Splunk is an AI-powered data and security platform that provides SIEM, observability, and IT operations capabilities with machine learning-driven threat detection. Its AI Assistant and advanced analytics help security teams detect, investigate, and respond to threats across complex environments.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free trial available, Splunk Free for up to 500MB/day

name: Elastic Security
description: Elastic Security is an AI-powered SIEM and endpoint security solution built on the Elastic Stack that provides unified threat detection, investigation, and response. It uses machine learning anomaly detection and generative AI to accelerate analyst workflows and automate threat hunting.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Open-source Elasticsearch free, basic cloud tier available
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Gold from $45/month, Platinum and Enterprise tiers available

name: LogRhythm
description: LogRhythm is an AI-powered SIEM platform that combines log management, security analytics, and SOAR capabilities to help security teams detect and respond to threats faster. Its embedded AI engine provides automated threat detection, investigation, and response workflows.

name: Swimlane
description: Swimlane is an AI-powered security orchestration, automation, and response (SOAR) platform that uses low-code automation to help security teams reduce alert volume and accelerate incident response. Its Turbine AI engine enables complex security workflows to run at machine speed.

name: Demisto (Palo Alto XSOAR)
description: Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR (formerly Demisto) is an AI-powered security orchestration, automation, and response platform that centralizes incident management and automates security workflows. It features a large marketplace of integrations and playbooks to accelerate security operations.

name: Tessian
description: Tessian is an AI-powered email security platform that uses machine learning to prevent inbound phishing attacks, business email compromise, and outbound data loss. It analyzes historical email behavior to understand normal communication patterns and detect anomalies in real time.

name: Abnormal Security
description: Abnormal Security is an AI-powered cloud email security platform that uses behavioral AI to stop sophisticated phishing, business email compromise, and supply chain attacks. It builds a behavioral baseline for every user and supplier to detect anomalous email activity with high precision.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Enterprise pricing per mailbox, custom quotes

name: Material Security
description: Material Security protects email data and productivity apps with AI-powered access controls, phishing protection, and sensitive data management. It retro-actively redacts sensitive information from email inboxes and adds multi-factor authentication to email access for critical accounts.

name: CodeQL
description: Semantic code analysis engine by GitHub that finds vulnerabilities using database-like queries over code.

name: GitGuardian
description: GitGuardian is an AI-powered secrets detection platform that scans code repositories, CI/CD pipelines, and developer environments for exposed API keys, credentials, and other sensitive information. It monitors public and private repositories in real time to prevent credential leaks.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free for public repositories and individual developers
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Team from $20/developer/month, Business and Enterprise tiers available

name: Semgrep
description: Semgrep is an open-source static analysis tool and AI-powered SAST platform that enables developers to write and enforce custom code security rules. It finds bugs, vulnerabilities, and code anti-patterns across 30+ programming languages and integrates into CI/CD pipelines.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Semgrep OSS free forever; Semgrep Community free tier

name: Veracode
description: Veracode is an AI-powered application security testing platform offering static, dynamic, and software composition analysis to identify and fix security vulnerabilities. It provides AI-guided remediation with Veracode Fix, which automatically generates code fixes for detected vulnerabilities.

name: Checkmarx
description: Checkmarx is an AI-powered application security testing platform that provides comprehensive SAST, DAST, SCA, and API security testing in a unified platform. Its AI-driven Codebashing product delivers developer security training contextualized to identified vulnerabilities.

name: SonarQube
description: SonarQube is an open-source platform for continuous code quality and security inspection that uses AI to detect bugs, vulnerabilities, and code smells across 30+ programming languages. Its AI-powered SonarCloud cloud service and IDE plugins provide instant code quality feedback in developer workflows.

pricing_detail.free_tier: SonarQube Community Edition free forever; SonarCloud free for open-source
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Developer Edition from $150/year, Enterprise and Data Center editions available

name: WhiteSource (Mend)
description: Mend (formerly WhiteSource) is an AI-powered application security platform specializing in software composition analysis and open-source security. It provides automated dependency scanning, license compliance checking, and AI-prioritized vulnerability remediation across software supply chains.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free for open source projects (Mend.io Bolt)

name: Socket
description: Socket is an AI-powered supply chain security tool that detects malicious and risky open-source packages before they enter your codebase. Unlike traditional SCA tools, Socket proactively analyzes package behavior to catch supply chain attacks, typosquatting, and obfuscated malware in real time.

name: Pentera
description: Pentera is an AI-powered automated security validation platform that continuously tests an organization's security controls by simulating real-world attack techniques. It provides prioritized remediation guidance based on actual exploitability rather than theoretical vulnerability scores.

name: HackerOne
description: HackerOne is the world's largest bug bounty and vulnerability disclosure platform, connecting organizations with a community of ethical hackers to discover and fix security vulnerabilities. It uses AI to triage and prioritize vulnerability reports and provides comprehensive vulnerability management workflows.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Program fees plus bounty payments; enterprise plans available

name: Bugcrowd
description: Bugcrowd is a crowdsourced security platform that connects organizations with skilled security researchers for bug bounty programs, penetration testing, and vulnerability disclosure. It uses AI to match researchers to programs and triage incoming vulnerability reports.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Program fees plus bounty payments; enterprise plans available

name: Orca Security
description: Orca Security is an agentless AI-powered cloud security platform that provides comprehensive visibility and risk prioritization across AWS, Azure, and GCP environments. Its SideScanning technology captures full cloud workload data without agents, detecting vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and sensitive data exposure.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Enterprise pricing, custom quotes based on cloud assets

name: Wiz
description: Wiz is an AI-powered cloud security platform that connects to cloud environments in minutes and provides complete visibility into risks across multi-cloud and Kubernetes environments. Its Security Graph technology identifies attack paths by correlating multiple risk factors, prioritizing the most critical threats.

name: Lacework
description: Lacework is an AI-driven cloud security platform that uses behavioral analysis to detect and prioritize security threats across cloud infrastructure, containers, and applications. Its Polygraph data platform correlates security events across the cloud lifecycle to surface real attacks from noise.

name: Aqua Security
description: Aqua Security is an AI-powered container and cloud-native security platform that protects applications across the full lifecycle from code to cloud. It provides container image scanning, runtime protection, Kubernetes security, and supply chain security for DevSecOps teams.

name: Sysdig
description: Sysdig is an AI-powered cloud and container security platform that provides real-time threat detection, vulnerability management, and compliance monitoring for cloud-native environments. Its Falco open-source project is the industry standard for runtime security in Kubernetes.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Sysdig Secure from $0/host for small teams, Enterprise pricing available

name: Tenable AI
description: Tenable is an AI-powered exposure management platform that provides vulnerability management, web application scanning, and OT/IoT security to help organizations understand and reduce their cyber exposure. Its ExposureAI uses generative AI to accelerate attack path analysis and provide actionable remediation guidance.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Tenable.io from $2,275/year for 65 assets, Enterprise pricing available

name: Qualys
description: Qualys is a cloud-based AI security and compliance platform offering vulnerability management, web application scanning, policy compliance, and threat protection. Its TruRisk scoring uses AI to prioritize vulnerabilities based on real-world exploitability and business context.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Enterprise pricing, custom quotes per asset

name: AutoGPT
description: AutoGPT is an open-source autonomous AI agent that chains GPT-4 calls to complete complex, multi-step tasks without continuous human oversight. It can browse the web, write and execute code, manage files, and interact with external services to accomplish user-defined goals.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: AutoGPT Cloud platform available with subscription

name: CrewAI
description: CrewAI is an open-source framework for orchestrating role-playing autonomous AI agents that collaborate to accomplish complex tasks. It enables developers to create crews of AI agents with specialized roles, tools, and goals that work together in structured workflows.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Open source framework free; CrewAI+ cloud platform available

name: LangGraph
description: LangGraph is an open-source framework by LangChain for building stateful, multi-actor AI agent applications with cycles and branching logic. It uses graph-based architecture to model complex agent interactions, enabling developers to build production-grade agentic workflows with fine-grained control.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: LangSmith cloud platform for monitoring from $39/month

name: Autogen (Microsoft)
description: Microsoft AutoGen is an open-source framework for building multi-agent AI systems where autonomous agents can converse with each other and with humans to solve tasks collaboratively. It simplifies the creation of complex LLM workflows with customizable agent behaviors and conversation patterns.

name: Semantic Kernel
description: Semantic Kernel is an open-source AI orchestration SDK by Microsoft that integrates LLMs with programming languages like C#, Python, and Java. It enables developers to build intelligent applications with AI agents, plugins, and planning capabilities for enterprise production use.

name: SuperAGI
description: SuperAGI is an open-source infrastructure platform for building and deploying autonomous AI agents, providing a visual GUI, agent marketplace, and tools for memory management. It allows teams to run multiple agents concurrently and monitor their performance in real time.

name: BabyAGI
description: BabyAGI is an open-source task-driven autonomous AI agent that uses LLMs and vector databases to create, prioritize, and execute tasks in pursuit of an overall goal. It was one of the first demonstrations of task-driven autonomous AI and inspired many subsequent autonomous agent frameworks.

name: MetaGPT
description: MetaGPT is an open-source multi-agent meta programming framework that assigns different roles to GPT agents to collaboratively develop software. It simulates a software company with agents acting as product manager, architect, engineer, and QA to produce entire codebases from a single requirement description.

name: ChatDev
description: ChatDev is an open-source virtual software company driven by LLM-powered agents that simulate different roles such as CEO, CTO, programmer, and tester to collaboratively create software. It uses structured chat workflows where agents communicate to design, code, test, and document complete applications.

name: Fixie AI
description: Fixie AI is an AI agent platform that enables developers to build, deploy, and manage intelligent agents that can use tools, access data, and interact with external APIs. It provides a cloud infrastructure for hosting conversational AI agents with persistent memory and tool-use capabilities.

name: Lindy AI
description: Lindy AI is a no-code AI employee platform that lets users create autonomous AI agents called Lindies to automate repetitive business tasks like email management, scheduling, and CRM updates. Lindies can connect to 3,000+ apps and make decisions based on contextual understanding.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free trial available with limited tasks

name: Relevance AI
description: Relevance AI is a no-code AI agent builder platform that enables businesses to create custom AI agents and multi-agent teams to automate sales, support, research, and operations workflows. Its visual builder allows non-technical users to chain AI tools and integrations without writing code.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Pro from $19/month, Team and Business tiers available

name: Stack AI
description: Stack AI is a no-code AI workflow builder that enables enterprises to build and deploy AI applications and automations by connecting LLMs with data sources and APIs visually. It supports complex multi-step AI pipelines with integrations for databases, documents, and third-party services.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Starter from $49/month, Team and Enterprise tiers available

name: Flowise
description: Flowise is an open-source drag-and-drop UI tool for building LLM-powered applications and AI agent workflows using LangChain and LlamaIndex components. It enables developers to visually design chatbots, document QA systems, and agentic pipelines and deploy them as APIs.

name: Dify
description: Dify is an open-source LLM application development platform that combines visual workflow orchestration, RAG pipeline building, and AI agent creation in a unified interface. It supports deployment of production-ready AI applications with monitoring, version control, and team collaboration features.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Open source, free to self-host; cloud free tier available
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Dify Cloud Pro from $59/month, Enterprise pricing available

name: Langflow
description: Langflow is an open-source visual workflow builder for creating AI pipelines and agents using LangChain components through a drag-and-drop interface. It enables rapid prototyping of RAG applications, multi-agent systems, and LLM workflows without extensive coding.

name: Pipedream
description: Pipedream is a serverless integration and automation platform that lets developers build workflows connecting APIs, databases, and AI models with code or a visual builder. It provides pre-built components for 1,000+ apps and supports real-time event-driven automation triggered by webhooks, schedules, or API events.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Basic from $29/month, Advanced and Business tiers available

name: Activepieces
description: Activepieces is an open-source automation platform that provides a no-code interface for building workflows that connect popular apps and services. It is designed as a self-hostable alternative to Zapier and Make, with an extensible pieces framework for custom integrations.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Open source, free to self-host; cloud free tier available

name: Huginn
description: Huginn is an open-source system for building agents that monitor the web and automate tasks on your behalf, similar to a self-hosted IFTTT or Zapier. It can track websites, fetch data from APIs, send notifications, and chain complex automated workflows through a visual interface.

name: Temporal
description: Temporal is an open-source workflow orchestration platform that makes it easy to build reliable, scalable distributed applications with durable execution guarantees. It enables developers to write workflows as code with automatic retry, state persistence, and fault tolerance built in.

name: Prefect
description: Prefect is a modern data workflow orchestration platform that enables data engineers to build, schedule, and monitor reliable data pipelines in Python. It provides automatic retries, caching, and real-time observability for both simple scripts and complex multi-step data workflows.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Open source Prefect Core free; Prefect Cloud free tier available

name: Dagster
description: Dagster is an open-source data orchestration platform designed for developing and maintaining data assets with lineage, observability, and reliability. It treats data pipelines as software assets with declarative definitions, making data engineering workflows testable and maintainable.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Open source, free to self-host; Dagster Cloud serverless free tier

name: Apache Airflow
description: Apache Airflow is the leading open-source workflow orchestration platform that enables data engineers to programmatically author, schedule, and monitor complex data pipelines using Python DAGs. It is widely deployed by data teams worldwide for orchestrating ETL processes, ML pipelines, and operational workflows.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Open source, free to self-host; managed offerings like Astronomer available
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Astronomer Cloud from $200/month, AWS MWAA pricing available

name: Retool
description: Retool is an AI-powered platform for building internal business tools by connecting to databases, APIs, and services with a visual drag-and-drop interface. It enables developers to build custom admin panels, dashboards, and operational workflows without full custom development.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Team from $12/user/month, Business and Enterprise tiers available

name: Appsmith
description: Appsmith is an open-source low-code platform for building custom internal tools, admin panels, and CRUD apps by connecting to any database or API. It provides a drag-and-drop builder with JavaScript customization, allowing teams to create production-grade internal applications rapidly.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Open source, free to self-host; cloud free tier available

name: Budibase
description: Budibase is an open-source low-code platform for building internal business tools, workflows, and CRUD apps with automation capabilities. It supports self-hosting, custom data sources, role-based access control, and built-in automation to rapidly build and deploy operational tools.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Open source, free to self-host; cloud free tier for 1 creator
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Pro from $50/month, Business and Enterprise tiers available

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Plus from $8/user/month, Pro and Enterprise tiers available

name: ReadMe
description: ReadMe is an AI-powered API documentation platform that creates interactive, personalized developer documentation with real-time API explorer, usage metrics, and AI-assisted troubleshooting. Its Owlbot AI answers developer questions by searching documentation and helping debug API issues.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Startup from $99/month, Business and Enterprise tiers available

name: Swagger/OpenAPI
description: Swagger (now SmartBear) is the world's most widely used API documentation and design toolset, built around the OpenAPI specification standard. It provides tools for designing, building, documenting, and testing REST APIs with auto-generated interactive documentation.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Swagger UI and Editor are free open source

name: Postman
description: Postman is the world's leading API platform for building, testing, documenting, and monitoring APIs, with AI-powered features for automated API testing and documentation generation. Its Postbot AI assistant helps write test scripts, suggests fixes for failing tests, and generates documentation.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free for individuals with generous limits
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Basic from $14/user/month, Professional and Enterprise tiers available

name: Insomnia
description: Insomnia is an open-source API client for designing, debugging, and testing REST, GraphQL, and gRPC APIs with a clean collaborative interface. It provides environment management, request chaining, and automated testing capabilities for development teams.

name: RapidAPI
description: RapidAPI is the world's largest API marketplace where developers can discover, test, and connect to thousands of public and private APIs in one place. It provides a unified interface for API management, testing, and monetization for both API providers and consumers.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free access to marketplace with usage limits
pricing_detail.paid_plans: API provider pricing varies; enterprise platform pricing custom
pricing_detail.api_cost: Per API call pricing varies by API

name: Hoppscotch
description: Hoppscotch is an open-source, lightweight API development tool for testing REST, GraphQL, WebSocket, and other API protocols directly in the browser or as a self-hosted app. It is a popular, fast alternative to Postman with a minimalist interface and real-time collaboration features.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Open source, free to use and self-host

name: Twilio
description: Twilio is a cloud communications platform providing AI-powered messaging, voice, email, and video APIs for building customer engagement applications. Its CustomerAI combines real-time customer data with generative AI to personalize interactions across SMS, WhatsApp, voice, and email channels.

name: SendGrid
description: SendGrid is a cloud-based email delivery platform by Twilio that provides transactional and marketing email APIs with high deliverability, analytics, and compliance tools. It is used by developers and marketers to send billions of emails reliably with advanced tracking and optimization features.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Essentials from $19.95/month, Pro and Premier tiers available

name: Mailgun
description: Mailgun is a developer-first email API platform that provides transactional email sending, email validation, and inbox placement tools for applications. It offers powerful email routing, parsing, and tracking capabilities for developers building email-driven applications.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Foundation from $35/month, Scale and Custom tiers available

name: Resend
description: Resend is a modern email API platform designed for developers that makes sending transactional emails simple, reliable, and with excellent deliverability. Built with React Email support, it provides a developer-friendly SDK, domain authentication, and email analytics.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free for up to 3,000 emails/month and 1 domain
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Pro from $20/month for 50,000 emails, Enterprise pricing available

name: Novu
description: Novu is an open-source notification infrastructure platform that provides a unified API for sending notifications across email, SMS, push, in-app, Slack, and other channels. It enables developers to manage notification workflows, user preferences, and delivery across all channels from a single integration.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Open source, free to self-host; Cloud free tier with 30,000 events/month

name: OneSignal
description: OneSignal is a customer messaging and engagement platform that provides push notifications, in-app messages, SMS, and email with AI-powered personalization and delivery optimization. It is used by thousands of apps and websites to engage users with targeted, automated messaging.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free for unlimited push notifications up to 10,000 subscribers
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Growth from $9/month, Professional and Enterprise tiers available

name: Pusher
description: Pusher is a hosted API platform for building real-time features like live notifications, activity feeds, chat, and presence indicators into web and mobile applications. It provides Channels for pub/sub messaging and Beams for push notifications with a developer-friendly SDK.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free Sandbox plan with 200 concurrent connections
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Startup from $49/month, Professional and Business tiers available

name: Ably
description: Ably is a reliable real-time messaging and event streaming infrastructure platform for building mission-critical live features in applications. It provides guaranteed message delivery, ordering, and persistence with pub/sub, presence, and push notification capabilities at massive scale.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free tier with 6M messages/month and 200 peak connections
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Standard from $39/month, Pro and Enterprise tiers available

name: Agora
description: Agora is a real-time voice, video, and interactive live streaming API platform that powers in-app communication features for social, gaming, education, and enterprise applications. It provides low-latency, high-quality audio and video infrastructure with AI-powered features like noise suppression.

name: LiveKit
description: LiveKit is an open-source WebRTC infrastructure platform for building real-time audio, video, and data applications at scale, commonly used for building AI voice agents and multi-party video applications. It provides server-side media processing, AI agent integration, and scalable media routing.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Open source, free to self-host; LiveKit Cloud free tier available
pricing_detail.paid_plans: LiveKit Cloud from $0.001/minute, Enterprise pricing available
pricing_detail.api_cost: Per minute usage pricing on cloud

name: Daily
description: Daily.co is a WebRTC video API platform that provides reliable, low-latency video and audio infrastructure for embedding calls into web and mobile applications. It offers a complete video SDK with screen sharing, recording, custom layouts, and prebuilt UI components.

name: Whereby
description: Whereby is a simple, browser-based video conferencing platform that requires no downloads or account creation for guests and provides persistent meeting rooms with custom URLs. It is popular for small teams, tutors, and customer-facing video meetings.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free for 1 meeting room up to 100 participants
pricing_detail.api_cost: Embedded API pricing per participant minute

name: Zoom AI Companion
description: Zoom AI Companion is Zoom's built-in generative AI assistant that provides meeting summaries, action item extraction, in-meeting question answering, and chat composition across Zoom Meetings, Team Chat, and Phone. It is included at no additional cost for paid Zoom users.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free 40-minute meetings for basic users; AI Companion included in paid plans
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Pro from $15.99/month, Business and Enterprise tiers available

name: Microsoft Teams AI
description: Microsoft Teams with Copilot AI provides enterprise collaboration with AI-powered meeting summaries, chat assistance, and intelligent search across the Microsoft 365 ecosystem. Teams AI includes Copilot for summarizing conversations, generating meeting notes, and automating tasks within chats.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free plan available with limited features
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Microsoft 365 Business Basic from $6/user/month; Copilot add-on at $30/user/month

name: Slack AI
description: Slack with Slack AI provides enterprise team messaging with AI-powered channel summaries, thread recaps, search answers, and workflow automation. Its AI features help teams catch up on missed conversations quickly and find information across the organization's Slack history.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Pro from $8.75/user/month, Business+ from $15/user/month; Slack AI add-on available

name: Discord AI
description: Discord is a community and gaming communication platform that integrates AI features including Clyde AI for answering questions in servers, AutoMod AI for content moderation, and a rich ecosystem of AI bots. It hosts large developer and AI research communities with AI-powered moderation tools.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Nitro from $9.99/month for enhanced features; Server Boosting available

name: Gather
description: Gather is an AI-powered virtual office platform that recreates the spontaneous collaboration of in-person offices through a 2D spatial video chat environment. Teams can move around a virtual office floor plan and initiate video conversations by walking up to colleagues' avatars.

pricing_detail.free_tier: Free for up to 25 users in a space
pricing_detail.paid_plans: Pro from $7/user/month, Premium and Enterprise tiers available

name: Tandem
description: Tandem is an AI-powered virtual office app that enables remote teams to see who's available and jump into conversations with one click, mimicking the spontaneous communication of co-located teams. It integrates with other tools and shows real-time status across the team's virtual office.

name: Around
description: Around is an AI-powered video call application designed for focused remote work, featuring automatic background blur, noise cancellation, and a compact floating video interface that stays out of the way during work. It is optimized for quick check-ins and collaborative work sessions for remote teams.

name: Tuple
description: Tuple is an AI-powered remote pair programming tool designed specifically for developers, providing ultra-low latency screen sharing, remote control, and high-quality audio optimized for coding sessions. It is built from the ground up for pair programming workflows with features like drawing on screen and multiple cursor support.

pricing_detail.paid_plans: Pro from $35/user/month, Business and Enterprise tiers available
